zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Threlkeld於1380年出生在英國波藍德斯卡雷比時，她的父親Sir William Threlkeld III33歲，母親Margaret Bowes30歲。她於1428年與Christopher Moresby IV在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1458年8月5日享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Threlkeld于1380年出生在英国波藍德斯卡雷比时，她的父亲Sir William Threlkeld III33岁，母亲Margaret Bowes30岁。她于1428年与Christopher Moresby IV在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1458年8月5日享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Threlkeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumbria): habitational name from Threlkeld in Cumbria, so named from Old Norse thrǽll ‘thrall, serf’ + kelda ‘spring, marshy place’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Threlkeld was born in 1380, in Scaleby, Cumberland, England, her father, Sir William Threlkeld III, was 33 and her mother, Margaret Bowes, was 30. She married Christopher Moresby IV in 1428, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 5 August 1458, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Threlkeld est née en 1380, à Scaleby, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Threlkeld III, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Margaret Bowes, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Moresby IV en 1428, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 5 août 1458, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Margaret Threlkeld 1380 in Scaleby, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Threlkeld III 33 und ihre Mutter Margaret Bowes 30. Sie hat 1428 in England Christopher Moresby IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 5. August 1458 im Alter von 78 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Threlkeld è nata il nel 1380 nel Scaleby, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Sir William Threlkeld III, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Margaret Bowes, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Christopher Moresby IV nel 1428, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 5 agosto 1458, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Threlkeldが1380年にイギリスクウンバーランドスケイレビーで生まれた時，父Sir William Threlkeld IIIは33歳，母Margaret Bowesは30歳であった。1428年にイギリスでChristopher Moresby IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1458年8月5日に78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Threlkeld(이)가 1380년 영국 c벌랜드 스알비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Threlkeld III(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Bowes(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1428년 영국에서 Christopher Moresby IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 8월 5일 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Margaret Threlkeld nasceu em 1380, em Scaleby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Threlkeld III, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Bowes, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher Moresby IV em 1428, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1458, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Threlkeld родилась в 1380 г. в местности скеилеби, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Threlkeld III было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Bowes, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Moresby IV в 1428 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 5 августа 1458 г. в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Margaret Threlkeld nació en 1380, en Scaleby, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Threlkeld III, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Margaret Bowes, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Christopher Moresby IV en 1428, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1458, a la edad de 78 años.
